content.p: Any person, firm, or corporation who shall violate any of the provisions of this chapter shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and shall, upon conviction, be punished by a fine of not exceeding $1,000 or by imprisonment not exceeding one year, or by both such fine and imprisonment, in the discretion of the court.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: For explanation of “this chapter”, referred to in text, see References in Text note set out under section 156 of this title.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: See note set out under section 151 of this title.
